title: OnboardingJourney
description: SYNTHETIC schema for demo purposes only. Represents how a future JSON-driven orchestration layer might define an onboarding journey as a sequence of reusable step modules.

module.description: References a file in /modules by moduleId.

conditional.description: True if this step may be skipped based on a business rule (e.g. credit-cross-sell).

dependsOn.description: moduleIds of steps that must be completed before this step can start, when that's a named business rule rather than just this step's position in the array (e.g. an e-signature step depending on session start).
